item.title: Explained: Why Rosmah couldn’t ‘reset’ her bribery trial and lost all three tries to remove judge
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 4 — Datin Seri Rosmah Mansor has officially exhausted all available legal avenues to press the...
Matched: urgent(+3), law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Electoral delineation a key step to restoring parity
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The principles of demarcation include ensuring a balance between the number of voters, the efficiency of election administration, and voter convenience.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), election(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Syed Saddiq still the face of Muda, say analysts
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Analysts say it will be tough for other leaders to match his personality, while one suggests that Muda join a coalition or rope in an external figure.
Matched: corruption(+3), court(+2), election(+2), ai(+3), breach(+3), who(+2)

item.title: ‘Scammers paying to target Malaysians’: Fahmi vows crackdown on deepfake social media ads under new law
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The Ministry of Communications is using the subsidiary instruments under the Online Safety...
Matched: law(+3), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Two Perak Education Dept officers claim trial to RM4,000 bribery charges
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
IPOH, March 3 — Two assistant directors from the Perak State Education Department (JPN) pleaded not guilty at the...
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: China’s consumers scout lower prices, secondhand goods as spending sputters
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
A longstanding taboo in Chinese culture against used goods is lifting rapidly amid stagnating wages, youth unemployment and a years-long property crisis.
Matched: breaking(+3), law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Airline, travel industries scramble with fallout from Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Major Gulf hubs have closed, 21,300 flights have been cancelled leaving passengers stranded, while airline shares tumble and oil prices surge squeezing profits.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: Sabalenka, Gauff back ‘rage rooms’ for players to blow off steam
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Players welcome the idea of controlled venting spaces after Coco Gauff’s viral Australian Open racket-smashing incident.
Matched: breaking(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Pentagon identifies first US soldiers killed in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The four served in the 103rd Sustainment Command from Des Moines, Iowa, part of the army's global logistics and supply operation and were killed in a drone strike on US military facility in Kuwait.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Fahmi: Platforms comply with 80pc of 6,481 pornographic post removal requests since 2022
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The Malaysian Communications and Multimedia Commission (MCMC) has requested the removal of...
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Putrajaya saves RM4b in diesel subsidies in 2025 after retargeting, Dewan Rakyat told
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 4 — The actual expenditure on diesel subsidies decreased to RM6.2 billion in 2025 compared to...
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: High Court rules against Genting founder’s grandchildren in landmark will challenge
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The High Court here today dismissed an application by the grandchildren of the late tycoon...
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)

item.title: Asian stocks tumble further, oil extends gains as inflation fears grow
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The continued crude supply disruptions from the Middle East risk undermining hopes for further monetary easing.
Matched: war(+3), inflation(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US says 2,000 targets hit as Iran retaliates across Gulf
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The US military claims the first day’s barrage surpasses the 2003 'shock and awe' campaign against Saddam Hussein’s Iraq.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Tennis world rocked by Middle East war as Indian Wells begins
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Top players remain stranded in the Middle East as the war disrupts global tennis travel ahead of the tournament in California.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2), who(+2)

item.title: Putrajaya says no tolerance for insults to Islam, warns public against spreading false claims
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The Prime Minister’s Office today said the government views seriously the malicious...
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Study: Over 2.85 million Malaysian children overweight or obese, more than 300,000 may develop serious diseases in later life
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 4 — More than 2.85 million Malaysian children aged five to 19 were overweight or living with o...
Matched: urgent(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Can Bills be drafted better before tabling in Parliament? Kula says improvements underway
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 3 — The government is giving high priority to improving the drafting of Bills to ensure greate...
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: MACC looking for Rafizi’s ex-aide
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Chai Jin Shern, also known as James Chai, was special functions officer to Rafizi Ramli when the Pandan MP was economy minister.
Matched: corruption(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Reform must go beyond post-audit fixes, says think tank
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Institute for Democracy and Economic Affairs says preventive governance is needed to stop recurring lapses flagged in the latest auditor-general’s report.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: PKR assemblyman Fahmi appeals to top leadership over suspension
item.description:
Source: The Star Nation (Malaysia)
GEORGE TOWN: Embattled PKR assemblyman Fahmi Zainol has appealed to the party's top leadership to withdraw his suspension, warning that acting on unproven court charges could set a damaging precedent for the party's future. Read full story
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: PM Anwar withdraws appeal over bid to refer eight questions of law to the Federal Court
item.description:
Source: The Star Nation (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA: Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim has withdrawn his appeal over the High Court's decision that dismissed his attempt to refer eight questions of law to the Federal Court linked to a lawsuit filed by Muhammed Yusoff Rawther. Read full story
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3)

item.title: Trump’s commerce chief agrees to testify in congressional Epstein probe
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
US commerce secretary Howard Lutnick has faced pressure over his associations with sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, especially after publicly released files undercut his claims of when he had severed ties with him.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Publish MPs’ Dewan attendance records, says TI-M
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Transparency International also calls for MPs to give written reasons for their absence during key votes, after the failure of the 10-year PM term limit bill.
Matched: law(+3), parliament(+2), ai(+3)
